_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Recommend updates to military strategy and doctrine with respect to advances in AI technology, legal obligations, Responsible AI, and DoD AI Ethical Principles.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to translate emerging AI ethics research, evolving societal expectations, and new regulatory guidance into practical governance policy updates that maintain organizational alignment.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-004 (AG, cosine: 0.572), AG-T-007 (AG, cosine: 0.555).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.513). Shared vocabulary: [ai, updates]. DCWF-only terms [advances, doctrine, dod, ethical, legal, military] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, alignment, emerging, ethics, evolving, expectations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.888, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Recommend updates to military strategy and doctrine with respect to advances in" and "Ability to translate emerging AI ethics research, evolving societal expectations" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.609 > STS 0.513 (gap +0.096). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, updates] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, updates]. DCWF-only: [advances, doctrine, dod, ethical, legal, military]. WIDAI-only: [ability, alignment, emerging, ethics, evolving, expectations].
